passiveAbilities.name: Guerilla Tactician
passiveAbilities.description: Other friendly Fauns within 6" gain +1 Melee Stat and [Swift: When making a Reaction Step while engaged by an enemy, this model may move 2” instead of the usual 1”. Once per turn.]

passiveAbilities.name: Felling Axe
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

activeAbilities.name: Furious Charge
activeAbilities.description: Move this model 3” directly towards target enemy model. If this character’s next action this turn is a Melee Attack against the same target then it deals +1 Dmg.

arcaneAbilities.name: Hunting Horn
arcaneAbilities.description:
Move target other friendly Faun X+1".
Catastrophe: The target is moved up to 3" by the resisting player.

signatureMove.name: Head Butt
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move the enemy model 1” directly away from this model.
